title: Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji
tagline: Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Karaikandeswarar Temple, Kanji is a Tamil Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Kanji village near the town of Thiruvannamalai in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Karaikandeswarar Temple, Kanji is a Tamil Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Kanji village near the town of Thiruvannamalai in Tamil Nadu, India. In this temple Shiva is worshiped as Karaikandeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Periyanayagi Amman. It is the first Karaikandeswarar (Shiva) temple among seven (saptha) temples located along the banks of Cheyyar River.

topPlaces.name: Kanji, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Kanji alias Kanchi is a town in Chengam taluk in Tiruvanamalai district, Tamil Nadu, India. Its population in the 2011 census was 5,873.

topPlaces.name: Kadaladi (Tiruvannamalai)
topPlaces.description: Kadaladi () is a small village in Kalasapakkam taluk, Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu, India. The nearby towns are Kalasapakkam, Pudupalayam, Thurinjapuram and Polur.

topPlaces.name: Pudupalayam
topPlaces.description: Pudupalayam is a panchayat town in Chengam taluk of Tiruvanamalai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Its pincode number is 606 705.It is well connected with Tiruvannamalai and Bangalore.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (147 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (147 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji?
faq.a: Stays in Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karaikandeswarar temple, Kanji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kanji, Tamil Nadu, Kadaladi (Tiruvannamalai), Pudupalayam.
